title: Chapter 77
content:
Chapter 77: Chapter 77: The Morning After

The morning sun filtered through the small gaps in the wooden shutters, casting thin, golden lines across the tangled bedsheets. The air in the room no longer smelled of old parchment; it was thick with the lingering, musky scent of their late-night activities.

Kai stirred, his

Constitution 10 easily shaking off the fatigue of the night. He opened his eyes to find his arms full of soft, warm flesh. Yun Xi was curled against his chest, her massive breasts squished comfortably against his ribs, her breathing slow and peaceful.

He moved slightly, and her eyes fluttered open.

"Good morning," Kai murmured, his voice a deep, gravelly rumble that sent a fresh shiver down her spine.

"Morning, Kai..." Yun Xi whispered, a bright, beautiful blush instantly staining her cheeks as the memories of the previous night flooded her mind. She looked down at their naked bodies, completely intertwined.

"Time to get up, Scholar," Kai teased, brushing a strand of hair from her face. "The Academy awaits."

They slowly untangled themselves from the messy, cum-stained sheets. The intimacy didn’t end with the sex; it carried over into the morning.

"Let me help you," Kai offered, picking up her oversized beige tunic from the floor.

Yun Xi stood before him, completely bare, shivering slightly in the cool morning air. Kai stepped close. Instead of just handing her the shirt, he bundled the fabric up and slipped it over her head himself. As the tunic fell, his large hands slid beneath the fabric, cupping her massive, heavy breasts one last time. He weighed them in his palms, his thumbs brushing over her sensitive, hardening nipples.

"Ah... Kai," Yun Xi gasped softly, leaning into his touch. "We have to get dressed..."

"I am dressing you," Kai smirked, giving her soft flesh a final, possessive squeeze before pulling his hands away and letting the tunic settle over her glorious curves.

"My turn," Yun Xi said, her voice laced with a newfound, albeit shy, confidence.

She picked up his Academy trousers. As Kai stepped into them, Yun Xi knelt on the floor to help him pull them up. Her hands traced the hard muscles of his calves and thighs. As she pulled the waistband up, the back of her hand deliberately brushed against the heavy, semi-hard bulge of his morning wood.

Kai sucked in a sharp breath. "Careful down there, Yun Xi. Or we might not make it to class."

Yun Xi giggled—a sweet, genuine sound—and quickly fastened his belt, her face burning. "All done."

They walked out of the bedroom together, looking fresh, though Yun Xi walked with a slight, tender limp, her inner thighs still sensitive from his monstrous invasion.

As they entered the small living area, the smell of steaming rice and sweet buns filled the air.

Xi Lan was standing by the small stove, stirring a pot. She was wearing a different dress today—a pale blue cotton gown—but it suffered from the same problem as the last one. It simply couldn’t contain her. Her enormous, motherly breasts strained against the buttons, threatening to pop them with every breath, and her thick, wide hips swayed as she cooked.

Hearing their footsteps, Xi Lan turned around.

When her eyes landed on Kai, a vivid flash of crimson instantly covered her face. The memory of the slippery floor, her torn dress, and his hot mouth closing over her exposed nipple was still burned into her mind.

"Oh! Kai!" she gasped, nearly dropping her wooden spoon. She quickly wiped her hands on her apron, her massive chest heaving nervously. "You... you are still here? You didn’t go home last night?"

Yun Xi stepped forward, adjusting her glasses, her own face flushed for entirely different reasons.

"We were studying all night, Mom," Yun Xi lied smoothly, though her voice wavered just a fraction. "We were going over the history texts. Kai fell asleep while reading, so... so I thought it would be bad to disturb him. I just let him rest."

Xi Lan blinked, looking between her daughter’s glowing, satisfied face and Kai’s calm, confident demeanor. Being a sweet, slightly gullible woman, she bought the excuse completely.

"Oh, my goodness!" Xi Lan sighed, placing a hand over her heart (and inadvertently pushing her cleavage higher). "You poor things, studying so hard! Yun Xi, you should have told me! I would have made a proper bed for him in the guest room. Sleeping at that little desk, or cramped on that tiny cot... it must have been so uncomfortable for a growing boy!"

Kai suppressed a wicked smirk.

It was cramped, he thought, but it was incredibly comfortable.

"It’s okay, Aunty," Kai said politely, bowing his head slightly. "Yun Xi was very... accommodating. But I think I should go now. It’s getting late for the Academy, and my mom must be waiting for me. She’ll be worried."

He took a step toward the door.

"Nonsense!" Xi Lan objected, stepping quickly to block his path.

As she moved, her heavy breasts bounced with a mesmerizing, gelatinous rhythm, catching Kai’s eyes instantly. She placed her hands on her wide hips, looking up at him with strict, motherly affection.

"You cannot leave on an empty stomach!" Xi Lan insisted, her sweet face turning serious. "What would your mother think of me? She would say, ’That Xi Lan didn’t even feed my son breakfast after he helped Yun Xi study all night!’ Haha, I simply cannot allow it."

She reached out and gently grabbed Kai’s arm, her soft, warm fingers pressing into his muscle.

"You both just sit down at the table," Xi Lan commanded, guiding him back. "I will prepare breakfast for both of you, fast. It’s almost ready anyway. You need your energy for the day!"

Kai looked down at the hand on his arm, then up to the deep, plunging neckline of her blue dress, where the soft, pale mounds of her breasts were pressed tightly together. He remembered the taste of her skin, the salty-sweet flavor of her sweat.

He glanced at Yun Xi, who was smiling and nodding enthusiastically, wanting him to stay just a little longer.

Kai relaxed his stance, a charming smile returning to his lips.

"Yes, Aunty," Kai conceded, letting his gaze linger on her chest for a second longer than was polite. "If you insist. I would love to taste your cooking."
